channel.title: films on alexis lavail
channel.description: Recent content in films on alexis lavail

item.title: Les misérables
item.description: I recently re-read Les Misérables from Victor Hugo. As a Frenchperson, it is of course a must-read, having had to idolize Victor Hugo all through schoolyears and beyond. I am not the biggest fan, but I must say that the guy can write. Some sentences just resonate with me. À ses pieds ce qu’on peut cultiver et cueillir ; sur sa tête ce qu’on peut étudier et méditer; quelques fleurs sur la terre et toutes les étoiles dans le ciel.
